auth.loginShowcaseLead: From idea to image—each creative pass, quietly anchored at the edge.
auth.loginShowcaseLine1: Multiple providers and image sessions—parameters and intent, traceable together.
auth.loginShowcaseLine2: Prompt assistance and history—refine with context you can return to.
auth.loginShowcaseLine3: Keys and quotas orchestrated by the platform—steady, reviewable, operable.
auth.captchaVerifyFailed: Security check failed. Check again before logging in.
auth.turnstileVerifyFailed: Security check failed. Check again before logging in.

idle.title: Preparing security check
idle.description: We confirm this is a real visit before signing you in.

loading.title: Loading security check
loading.description: If the check does not appear, review your network, browser extensions, or proxy settings.

ready.title: Complete the security check below
ready.description: You can log in after it passes. Retry if the widget fails to load.

timeout.title: Security check timed out
timeout.description: Your network or browser may have blocked the widget. Try again.

error.title: Security check failed to load
error.description: Retry the check, or disable browser extensions that block scripts.

unsupported.title: This browser cannot run the security check
unsupported.description: Update your browser or use a modern browser such as Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

disabled.title: Security check is disabled
disabled.description: This environment does not require an extra check. You can log in directly.

shell.subtitle: Image operations
shell.tagline: Create, review, and govern image generation tasks.

workspace.title: Image generation
workspace.oneShotEmpty: The latest result will be prioritized here after generation
workspace.generationHint: The result will appear here automatically
workspace.generationFailedHint: No usable image was generated. Retry or adjust the prompt and submit again.
workspace.emptyPrompt: Enter a prompt to start generating images
workspace.referenceRequired: Add a reference image before using image to image
workspace.referenceImageInputHint: Click to upload, paste, or drag images here
workspace.referenceLimit: The current provider supports at most {count} reference images
workspace.modeUnsupported: The current provider does not support this generation mode
workspace.sizeUnsupported: The current provider does not support this canvas size
workspace.deleteConfirm: Delete this message and its image records?

aiImage.assistantDisabled: The prompt assistant is disabled by an administrator.
aiImage.assistantEmpty: Describe the image you want, or click Generate prompt at any time. If details are missing, the AI will fill them in using common visual prompt best practices.
aiImage.assistantDegraded: The assistant is using a general prompt template
aiImage.assistantInputPlaceholder: Reply to the AI, or add more visual details...
aiImage.assistantInputShortcutHint: Enter to send, Ctrl + Enter / Shift + Enter for a new line
aiImage.assistantLimitReached: The chat limit was reached before a usable prompt was returned. Click Generate prompt to finish from the current details; missing parts will be filled in reasonably.
aiImage.assistantReadyBody: It has been filled into the prompt field in the generation panel. You can keep editing it there or generate the image.
aiImage.assistantSubtitle: Chat naturally and the AI will turn your brief into a usable prompt.
aiImage.blankCaseSummary: Skip case templates and chat with AI to shape the prompt.
aiImage.promptPlaceholder: Pick a case to fill this prompt, or describe the image directly...
aiImage.referenceBrief: The user has uploaded {count} reference image(s); do not inspect image content, only use the user's description for image-to-image prompt writing.
aiImage.referenceBriefWithDescription: The user has uploaded {count} reference image(s); do not inspect image content. Use this user-written reference description for image-to-image prompt writing: {description}
aiImage.referenceDescriptionHint: Describe the subject, composition, brand, text, and elements that must stay unchanged.
aiImage.referenceDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: the reference shows a white wireless earbud product. Keep the shape, logo, and front angle; only change the background and lighting...
aiImage.searchCases: Search cases, tags, or use cases
aiImage.sizeFallback: The case recommends {recommended}, which this provider does not support. Using {size} instead.
aiImage.subtitle: Start from a scene case, adapt it, then submit generation.

history.title: History
history.deleteUnavailable: Only completed generated sessions with succeeded or failed tasks can be deleted

announcementsAdmin.title: Announcement management
announcementsAdmin.subtitle: Publish system announcements for all users or admins.
announcementsAdmin.editingHint: Editing an existing announcement; publishing updates its visibility.
announcementsAdmin.contentPlaceholder: Markdown is supported, including headings, lists, links, and code blocks.
announcementsAdmin.previewHint: Users will see a similar view in announcement details.
announcementsAdmin.previewEmpty: Enter announcement content to preview it here

promptCases.adminSubtitle: Maintain the scene cases, prompt templates, and attribution shown on the AI image page.
promptCases.editorDescription: Edit case title, category, prompt, thumbnail, attribution, and publish status.
promptCases.externalAttributionHint: External cases must include source URL, author, and license before publishing.
promptCases.importHint: Paste a case array or an object with a cases array. Imported cases always enter draft.
promptCases.internalAttributionHint: Internal original cases can stay internal; still add clear summaries and tags.
promptCases.tagsPlaceholder: Separate with commas or new lines
promptCases.title: Title
promptCases.userPreviewHint: Shows only the case details, prompt template, and attribution users will see.

generationEntry.title: Generation page switches
generationEntry.subtitle: Control which generation pages regular users can see. Keep at least one page enabled.
generationEntry.workspacePageHint: Image generation workspace for professional parameters and batch image creation.
generationEntry.aiImagePageHint: New case-based and AI-assisted entry for lighter image creation.
generationEntry.atLeastOnePage: Keep at least one generation page enabled
generationEntry.atLeastOnePageHint: When one page is disabled, regular users will only see the other generation entry.
generationEntry.metricsWindow: Currently showing regular-user events from the last {days} days.

sysadmin.passwordOptional: New password (leave blank to keep unchanged)
sysadmin.name: Name
sysadmin.apiKeyOptional: New API key (leave blank to keep unchanged)
sysadmin.keyDeleteBlockedByGroup: This key is already in group "{name}". Remove it from the group before deleting it.
sysadmin.keyDisableBlockedLastGroupKey: Group "{name}" has only one enabled key left, so this key cannot be disabled.
sysadmin.label: Label
sysadmin.keyGroupProviderMismatch: Groups can only contain keys from the same provider
sysadmin.selectGroupKeyDialogDescription: Choose a provider key for "{name}", then confirm to add it to the group.
sysadmin.noAvailableGroupKeys: No available keys for this provider
sysadmin.preferencesDescription: Manage your default generation key and the global AI prompt assistant model.
sysadmin.personalKeyDescription: Only affects the provider key used by default for your own image generation.
sysadmin.promptAssistantModelDescription: Applies to the prompt assistant used by all users on the AI image page.
sysadmin.promptAssistantModelQwenDescription: Default model for Chinese, multilingual prompts, complex instructions, and prompt rewriting.
sysadmin.promptAssistantModelLlamaFp8Description: Lightweight and stable, suitable as a cost-friendly fallback.
sysadmin.promptAssistantModelLlamaDescription: Standard version with higher cost, useful when preserving a compatibility baseline.
sysadmin.captchaSettingsDescription: Choose the login challenge provider by visitor region: Tencent Cloud Captcha, Cloudflare Turnstile, ALTCHA, or disabled.
sysadmin.captchaDomesticHint: Uses Cloudflare CF-IPCountry; mainland China traffic follows this setting.
sysadmin.captchaOverseasHint: Non-mainland China or unknown-region traffic follows this setting.
sysadmin.altchaDifficultyHint: Range 10000-200000. Higher values slow browser solving while Worker verification stays nearly constant.
sysadmin.micuGrokFeatureDescription: Sysadmins always have access. This only controls which admins can see and use the Micu Grok image target.
sysadmin.enterUserId: Enter a user ID to load sessions
sysadmin.selectSession: Select a session to view messages
